name: rcc
description: Focused RCC-family skills for RCC itself, robots, holotree environments, work items, Action Server packages, and CI maintenance workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Focused RCC skills for RCC core, robots, work items, action packages, and CI maintenance.
interface.longDescription: RCC-family workflows split into focused skills for RCC CLI/source orientation, robot scaffolding and holotree environments, work item adapters, ordinary Action Server packages, and RCC-powered CI maintenance.
defaultPrompt: Choose the right RCC specialist skill for this task.
Orient me in RCC source, holotree, caches, endpoints, or templates.
Debug this robot.yaml or conda.yaml setup.
Design a local work item queue or adapter flow.
Set up RCC-powered CI maintenance safely.
